Portfolio.title: Projects We Can Handle
Portfolio.subtitle: Examples of solutions we can provide
Portfolio.cta:
Have a similar project?
Feel free to reach out
Portfolio.app1desc: Mobile application for streamlining internal workflows. Implemented real-time notifications, approval workflows, and dashboard features.
Portfolio.app2desc: B2B order management platform. Full-scratch development including inventory integration, payment processing, and admin panel.
Portfolio.web1desc: Complete renewal of a major corporation's website. Achieved 150% increase in traffic through brand refresh and SEO optimization.
Portfolio.web2desc: Specialized recruitment site for new graduates and mid-career hires. 200% increase in applications through video content and interactive UI.
Portfolio.ai1desc: Automated customer support responses. Achieved 70% reduction in response time through GPT-powered high-accuracy answer generation.
Portfolio.ai2desc: Automated routine tasks including invoice processing, data entry, and report generation. Achieved 200 hours/month reduction in workload.
Portfolio.content1desc: Japanese localization of popular Korean webtoons. Full service including translation, lettering, and cultural adaptation with 50+ titles completed.
Portfolio.content2desc: Service introduction videos, recruitment videos, SNS short-form content. Full production from planning to completion.

ITServices.title: IT Solutions

Combining cutting-edge technology with veteran engineering expertise
to deliver IT solutions that accelerate business growth.

app.title: Application Development
app.description: One-stop mobile and web application planning, design, development, and operations. We create user-friendly, beautifully designed applications focused on user experience.
app.features: iOS / Android Native Development,Cross-platform Development (React Native / Flutter),Web Application Development,API Design & Development,UI/UX Design

web.title: Website Design & Renewal
web.description: We build optimal websites for every purpose — corporate sites, service sites, e-commerce, landing pages. High-quality sites with SEO and accessibility built in.
web.features: Corporate Website Design,E-commerce Development,Landing Page Creation,CMS Implementation & Customization,SEO & Analytics

ai.title: AI & Workflow Automation
ai.description: From AI technology implementation including ChatGPT API to RPA-driven workflow automation. We support efficiency improvement and new AI-powered workflows.
ai.features: AI Chatbot Development,ChatGPT API Integration,RPA Implementation,Workflow Automation Consulting,Data Analysis & Auto-reporting

hr.title: HR System Development
hr.description: Specialized systems for HR operations including attendance, performance evaluation, and recruitment management. Custom integrations with existing systems.
hr.features: Attendance Management,Performance Evaluation System,Applicant Tracking (ATS),Payroll Integration,Employee Portal

dispatch.title: IT Staffing Services
dispatch.description: We connect experienced IT engineers to match your project scale and phase. Quick matching of optimal talent for your team.

ContentServices.title: Creative Solutions
ContentServices.subtitle: Accelerating Business with Creative Power
ContentServices.description:
From webtoon localization to original content production,
we deliver high-quality creative services.

webtoonLocalize.title: Webtoon Localization
webtoonLocalize.description: Japanese localization of popular Korean webtoons. Comprehensive service covering translation accuracy, cultural adaptation, lettering, and quality control. Over 50 titles localized.
webtoonLocalize.features: High-quality Translation (KR→JP),Cultural Adaptation & Localization,Lettering & Typesetting,Quality Control & Proofreading,Platform Delivery

corpLocalize.title: Corporate Localization Support
corpLocalize.description: Multi-language support for all corporate documents including manuals, marketing materials, and websites. Accurate and natural translations centered on Korean, Japanese, and English.
corpLocalize.features: Technical Document Translation,Marketing Translation,Website Localization,DTP & Layout Adjustment,Terminology Management

webtoonProd.title: Webtoon Production
webtoonProd.description: Full production of original webtoons from planning to completion. Our professional creative team handles story planning, character design, drawing, and coloring.
webtoonProd.features: Story Planning & Scenario,Character Design,Drawing & Line Art,Coloring & Finishing,Serialization Support

contentProd.title: Content Production
contentProd.description: Diverse creative needs including video content, graphic design, and SNS content. Supporting corporate branding and promotion with creative power.
contentProd.features: Promotional Video Production,Motion Graphics,SNS Content Creation,Banner & Ad Design,Branding Design
